wordplay_note: He gets his portion — and it destroys him
card_description: Nathan Anteil (meaning "Anteil = share/portion (German)") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Confessions of a Crap Artist*. Young man drawn into Fay's orbit who becomes her lover and tool. Name note: He gets his portion — and it destroys him. The naive intellectual consumed by a stronger personality. First appears in *Confessions of a Crap Artist*.

reference.brief: Young man drawn into Fay's orbit who becomes her lover and tool
reference.significance: The naive intellectual consumed by a stronger personality
